question: Please retell the story of the nurse who was teaching you English and asked whether you wanted to 'fly to the ceiling.' Where were you living, about what year was it, and what exactly did each of you say when you learned she meant marijuana?
answer: The house in Royal Oak wellness the nurse came and teach me English and told me to smoke and then you can fly to the ceiling, but I told her I don’t know how to
